assertion_results.text: The test change classification analysis is based on comparing base-branch and PR-branch file content (function additions, removals, assertion changes) — the structural and semantic assessment references test file content, not acceptance criteria or task requirements (constraint 1.18)

Reductive findings (lines 115-140) reference base-branch test file content directly — quoting the base-branch assertion ('pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12?repository_url=...') vs the PR-branch assertion. The structural analysis references test file content (function signatures, assertion code) rather than acceptance criteria. The semantic assessment (lines 155-163) does reference task requirements but only to contextualize the structural findings — the classification itself is driven by the structural scan of test file content.
